name: AIR File Fallback Pipeline
description: Defers AIR file processing to Laravel AirFileParser (Phase 2 limitation)

meta.description: AIR file processing fallback. Returns deferred status to Laravel, which then triggers AirFileParser skill.

requirements.laravel_skill: AirFileParser skill must be available in Laravel
requirements.callback_handler: Laravel callback handler must recognize extraction_status='deferred'

meta.phase3_upgrade: Phase 3 will implement native AIR parsing in N8n using AirFileParser logic
